channel.title: About on Prasanna's blog
channel.description: Recent content in About on Prasanna's blog

item.title: Welcome
item.description: A post shared by Prasanna Srivatsav (@vogxn) on Jan 24, 2017 at 6:26pm PST Greetings - I’m a software developer based in Bangalore, India. Many years ago I wrote blogs while going through college at the IIIT-H. As life took over and the dayjob paid the bills, I lost touch with blogging. Back then blogging was a big deal and I used to read the ilks of Meghalomania and Krish Ashok.
